summary: Google Sign-In endpoint + identity link (ships enabled; token validation lives in Ctx0.Security)
userSteps: Register the OAuth client ids under Authentication:Google:ClientIds (docs/security/AUTHENTICATION.md).

AppApi/Endpoints/v1/UsersEndpoints.cs:
users.MapPost("/google/authenticate", async (
                GoogleAuthenticateRequest request, IMediator mediator, CancellationToken ct) =>
                Results.Ok(await mediator.Send(
                    new AuthenticateGoogleUserCommand(request.IdToken), ct)))
            .AllowAnonymous()
            .RequireRateLimiting("auth");
